other_observers: Scott Roederer and companion and one other; I was original finder and identifier
specific_location: Sheldon Lake at City Park, on Mulberry St
description: Adult gull similar to Ring-billed gull but slighlty (5-10%) smaller, with slightly darker gray mantle with broad white tertial crescent and white scapular crescent, wings with black tips, each black primary tipped with white (when sitting); white head and underparts, with head heavily smudged with gray-brown streaks, especially on the nape; dark eye; small yellowish bill with dark smudge near tip. Thin yellowish legs.Behaviors: Sitting on ice.Call: not heardPlumage: Definitive Basic aka adult winter
